name: Witch's Doll
short_description: Witch's Doll is a first-person psychological horror game with realistic graphics. Beware, something is lurking in the dark. Get ready for intense jumpscares.
detailed_description:
Story:

You take the role of a young writer in search of an affordable place to live while working on the next novel. You have come across an advertisement for a very cheap apartment that is owned by an elderly woman who lost her daughter a few years ago. In this area, many people have gone missing, and the locals consider the place to be cursed.

During your first night in your new apartment, a massive storm causes the electricity to go out, and you feel the presence of something evil watching you from behind. There are strange screams coming from the elderly woman's apartment, and you feel the need to go check out what it is all about.

Uncover the mystery behind this cursed place, the missing people, and the horrifying truth about the elderly woman in this chilling story.

Genre:

Dark psychological horror in the genre of Walking Simulator.

Environment:

Prepare to be immersed in a world of fear and realism. Powered by Unreal Engine 5, the game is designed with hyper-realism that creates a vintage aesthetic which enhances the terrifying experience, featuring high-quality sounds. Be sure to wear headphones for the best audio experience.


The game includes intense jumpscares and scenery. Brace yourself!

Average time to complete the game: 70 min

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Greek, Japanese, Korean, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Romanian, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Ukrainian
*languages with full audio support
